summary: The recovered authority and hygiene policies match the documented March failure mode, and the landing-ledger stop-hook wiring is non-blocking by construction. The only note is operational: PR-state classification is exact only when gh/network is available; offline mode intentionally reports pushed branches as UNVERIFIED instead of guessing.

reverified_gates.evidence: session_state listed both target review debts as pending; recent root HEAD was f9bb5da with last platform claude-code.
205ea77 adds catalog/repo_authority_policy.yaml and catalog/gitwiz_hygiene_policy.yaml and updates recovered-canon status text; no nested repo files are changed by the root policy commit.
The policy preserves the documented rule that root archive/intake material is not canonical by default, local checkouts are working clones, and published state requires explicit commit and push.

reverified_gates.command: git show --stat --oneline fc5d737 -- tools/session_stop_hook.py tools/publication_debt.py catalog/publication_debt_exemptions.yaml tests/test_workspace_verify.py
reverified_gates.evidence: fc5d737 adds the publication_debt ledger, exemption file, workspace-verify coverage, and a stop-hook call site.
record_landing_ledger wraps the ledger scan and record call in try/except Exception and prints a skipped message, so ledger failure cannot block session close.
The scan returned 21 documented exemptions and no unexempt debt entries after live PR-state verification.
CloudBank PR #1016 is open from feat/ord-policy-family to main; it is active Claude-adjacent work and not an unpublished-branch debt.

reverified_gates.command: python3 tools/session_claim.py check --repo root --paths catalog/session_state.json reports/analysis/peer_reviews --json
reverified_gates.evidence: Initial status was clear; Codex then created claim codex-20260612T230308Z-codex-review-debt-clearance-2026-06-12 for the edited root paths.

findings.evidence: tools/publication_debt.py _branch_has_open_pr() returns None when gh is unavailable; the offline scan reported feat/ord-policy-family as PR state UNVERIFIED, while the live gh check showed PR #1016 open.
findings.description: Offline publication-debt scans are intentionally conservative. Operators should refresh with gh/network before treating a pushed feature branch as unpublished debt.

next_actions: Leave CloudBank PR #1016 and the dirty mesh-router test adaptation to the active Claude/Codex branch owner.
When the hub returns to main, refresh catalog/repo_registry.yaml from the generated workspace scan rather than hand-editing the generated registry.
